fato_historico: 1983: The first three-dimensional reconstruction of a human head in a CT is published.
energia_do_dia: Today, you may find that the energy encourages you to look beneath the surface of things. Much like the first time science revealed the hidden layers of a human form, you are invited to reconstruct your own inner image. It is a good time to embrace your complexity and find beauty in your unique, multifaceted soul.
frase_do_dia: Seeing clearly allows you to build the life you truly dream of having.
significado_numero: A number representing independence and the start of a fresh cycle.
conselho: Consider looking at your challenges from a completely different angle today.
